query: SELECT id, bookTitle, authorName, s3CoverUrl, coverUrl FROM book_profiles WHERE authorName LIKE '%&%' OR authorName LIKE '% and %' OR authorName LIKE '%,%' ORDER BY authorName LIMIT 50;
